title: ICAI CA Final May 2026 Exams: Registration Window Now Open!
content:
# ICAI CA Final May 2026 Exams: Registration Window Now Open!

Ek important update hai! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne CA Final May 2026 examinations ke liye online registration announce kiya hai. Candidates apni preparations fast-track kar lein, kyunki application window ab open ho chuki hai.

*   **Registration Start Date:** Online application forms submission March 3, 2026 (10:00 AM IST) se shuru ho gaya hai.
*   **Last Date (Without Late Fee):** Bina late fee ke form submit karne ki last date March 16, 2026 (11:59 PM IST) hai.
*   **Last Date (With Late Fee):** Late fee ke saath, forms March 19, 2026 (11:59 PM IST) tak submit kiye ja sakte hain.
*   **Correction Window:** Examination form mein details edit karne ke liye correction window March 20, 2026 (10:00 AM IST) se March 22, 2026 (11:59 PM IST) tak open rahegi.
*   Candidates ko ICAI ke Self Service Portal (SSP), `eservices.icai.org` ke through apply karna hoga.
*   Iss baar, ek major change yeh hai ki students ab apne zone/city mein preferred exam centre directly select kar paayenge.

## Read the Official Document
* [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post/examinations-may-2026)

*Published on: 4 March 2026*
